76.reason: [If "article.txt" does not exist or cannot be opened, fp will be NULL, leading to undefined behavior when fgetc(fp) is called.]

79.reason: [If fp is NULL (file open failed), this causes undefined behavior. Also, char should be int to properly handle EOF.]
